Daniel Okafor
Senior Software Engineer, Brooklyn, NY
daniel.okafor@example.com | 555-201-3003 | github.com/danokafor

SUMMARY
Senior software engineer with 9 years building distributed backend systems and
APIs at scale. Deep experience with event-driven architecture, microservices,
and cloud infrastructure. Comfortable owning services end to end from design
through on-call.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Software Engineer — StreamScale (2020–present)
- Designed and operated event-driven microservices in Go and Python processing
  80M events/day on Kafka and AWS, with exactly-once delivery semantics.
- Led the migration of a monolith to Kubernetes, cutting p99 latency 35% and
  halving deploy times; introduced distributed tracing and SLOs.
- Built internal platform tooling and CI/CD pipelines adopted by 12 teams.

Software Engineer — DataForge (2016–2020)
- Built REST and gRPC APIs in Java and Python backing a B2B analytics product.
- Implemented Terraform infrastructure-as-code and PostgreSQL data models.

SKILLS
Python, Go, Java, distributed systems, microservices, REST, gRPC, APIs, Kafka,
AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, PostgreSQL, Redis, system design, CI/CD,
observability, scalability

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science, Columbia University, 2016
